title: JBCクラシックの後に・浮かれ気分で？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The JBC Classic turns out to be a huge hit, thanks
in no small part to Smart Falcon's popularity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is the pinnacle of dirt racing, the
year-end Tokyo Daishoten.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, a conversation with fans reaffirms that
the public's attention come year's end is instead
centered on the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decide to go watch the Arima Kinen in
preparation for the Tokyo Daishoten.
